color_usage.background: Full-bleed dark base on every slide.
color_usage.accent: CTAs, key highlights, chart accents only — never body text.
color_usage.accent_alt: Use sparingly to mark secondary highlights or icons.

typography.pairing: Geometric sans headlines + clean grotesque body. Confident, modern, technical.
typography.notes: All headlines sentence-case; only STAT labels go uppercase. Tight tracking on large display sizes; relaxed on body.

arrow_right.brief: thin-stroke right-arrow glyph, monoline, accent #7C5CFF, transparent background, ~64×64 px

check.brief: monoline checkmark glyph, accent #00D4C8, transparent background, ~64×64 px

bolt.brief: monoline lightning bolt glyph, accent #7C5CFF, transparent background, ~64×64 px

circuit_texture.brief: subtle circuitry texture on dark #0B0B0F, low-contrast, tileable, no text, abstract

accent_glow.brief: soft radial accent glow, #7C5CFF center fading to transparent, square aspect

cta_pill.description: Pill-shaped button. Accent fill (#7C5CFF), white text, monoline arrow glyph right-aligned. Used for slide CTAs.

stat_block.description: Giant stat number in accent_alt (#00D4C8), short label beneath in label typography (uppercase, tracked).

slots.name: value
slots.description: Large numeric or token value, e.g. '10×'.

slides.intent: Cover slide. Establish the product as a brand-new category.

content.headline: Your brand has an Operating System now

image.brief: Dark gradient backdrop #0B0B0F with subtle circuitry texture; empty space in upper third for headline overlay; premium minimal mood, no people, no text.

slides.intent: Introduce the agent layer of the product.

content.headline: Agents that do the work
content.body: Each agent owns a lane — content, research, ops — and hands off cleanly.

slides.intent: Explain the skills concept with a magazine-feel slide.

content.headline: Skills, not prompts
content.body: Reusable capabilities like this Canva carousel generator, versioned and shared.

slides.intent: Show compounding value over time with a punchy stat slide.
Closing CTA slide. Mirror cover slide's visual treatment.

image.brief: Dark gradient backdrop matching slide 1, full-bleed; same premium minimal mood; room for headline overlay in lower third.
